title: Dielsantha galeopsoides

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Dielsantha galeopsoides include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create supplements and tonics.
